segments.text: Good morning, this is Dr. Shikrita Naini calling on behalf of Tata AIG.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Which language are you comfortable with?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hindi, speak Hindi, I understand. You won't understand Gujarati, right?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: If you need Gujarati, I will transfer your call to another doctor.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, speak Hindi, speak Hindi, it's fine, no problem.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Is this Mr. Manjesh Safia Mohammed Bilal Bhai?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This call is about your insurance policy. We have decided to proceed with your proposal, but as part of the process, we need to conduct a telephonic medical verification where we will ask you some verification medical history questions, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please note that the answers and information you provide on this call will be considered as part of your proposal. If the policy is accepted, there will be a legal contract between you and Tata AIG. Any wrong or false answer can affect your approval and later lead to claim rejection. Therefore, please answer carefully after understanding.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And this call is recorded for the company's quality and audit purposes and will take 10 to 12 minutes. May I continue with the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then, do one thing, call after half an hour.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Hello, I need to go to the washroom. Because of that, okay?
segments.speaker: customer
